free_text: WITH A MEAN ENERGY OF 14.7 MEV AND AN
ENERGY SPREAD OF 100 KEV AT THE SAMPLE
SILICON JUNCTION DETECTOR USED TO MEASURE
NEUTRON FLUX BY MONITORING ASSOCIATED ALPHAS
FROM D-T REACTION. ESTIMATED ERROR LESS
.THIS PAPER FOLLOWS ON FROM AN EARLIER ONE IN WHICH
6402).THE MAIN DIFFERENCE IS THAT IN THE PRESENT
WORK THICKER SAMPLES COULD BE USED TO INCREASE THE
COUNT RATE AS AN IMPROVED EXPRESSION FOR SELF-
SUPPORT, SELF-ABSORPTION AND SCATTERING IN SOURCE
MATERIAL, G.M. WINDOW ABSORPTION AND POOR GEOMETRY
POSSIBLE ERRORS IN THE PUBLISHED DECAY CHAINS
.THIS CROSS SECTION WAS NOT MEASURED INDEPENDENTLY
BUT SUMMED WITH THE (N,A) CROSS SECTION FOR THE
SAME NUCLEUS AS THE HALF-LIVES OF THE RESIDUALS
ARE ALMOST THE SAME. THE SUM WAS MEASURED AS
105+-2.0 MB. THE CROSS SECTIONS WERE SEPARATED
.THIS CROSS SECTION WAS NOT MEASURED INDEPENDENTLY
BUT SUMMED WITH THE (N,2N) CROSS SECTION FOR THE
SAME NUCLEUS AS THE HALF-LIVES OF THE RESIDUALS
ARE ALMOST THE SAME. THE SUM WAS MEASURED AS
105+-2.0 MB. THE CROSS SECTIONS WERE SEPARATED
